title: microsorum biseriatum
intro: Microsorum biseriatum, also known as Java fern, is a species of aquatic plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microsorum biseriatum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and prevent cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into capsules or infusions, or used as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
